response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable contributions to tooling and open-source projects, but lacks clear, recent, or deep involvement with Java/Kotlin, Spring, JVM tooling, or IDE internals — the core focus of the role. His Java exposure is minimal and dated, with no evidence of enterprise framework or IDE subsystem work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Proven track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: Minimal recent or demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin or JVM ecosystem
No evidence of work on IDE internals, language servers, or enterprise framework tooling (Spring, Hibernate, etc.)
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not aligned with Java-centric IDE focus
